statement: In every magma, Equation 2353 (`x = (y * (y * (z * y))) * z`) implies Equation 3938 (`x * y = (x * (z * y)) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0902
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op y (op z y))) z)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x y) = (op (op x (op z y)) x)
